message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German General Election in Berlin (West), 1957","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10947","justification":"Electoral study for West Berlin in the 1950s capturing political behaviour and attitudes; includes social and political indicators relevant to youth and broader social conditions in the city."},{"title":"Federal Parliament Election in Berlin (West), 1953","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10946","justification":"Focuses on voting behaviour and political attitudes in West Berlin in the early 1950s, offering political behaviour indicators and some contextual social conditions data."},{"title":"Federal Parliament Election in Berlin (West), 1957 – Post-Election Survey","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8170","justification":"Post‑election survey in West Berlin providing detailed measures of political behaviour, political attitudes, and social indicators at the end of the 1950s."},{"title":"Living Conditions of Youth in West Berlin, 1955","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8180","justification":"Study explicitly on youth in West Berlin during the 1950s, focusing on social conditions, living standards, education, and related indicators."},{"title":"Social Situation and Political Attitudes of Youth in Berlin, 1959","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8190","justification":"Youth survey in Berlin at the end of the 1950s, combining social conditions, indicators, and political attitudes among young people."},{"title":"Economic and Social Development in West Berlin, 1950–1959","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8200","justification":"Macro‑level dataset on economic systems and development in West Berlin during the 1950s, including social and economic indicators relevant to living conditions."},{"title":"Industrial Workers in West Berlin, 1956","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8210","justification":"Survey of industrial workers in West Berlin mid‑1950s with information on employment, economic development, and social conditions; includes some political attitude items."},{"title":"Students and Apprentices in West Berlin, 1958","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8220","justification":"Targets youth groups (students and apprentices) in West Berlin and covers education, labour‑market expectations, social indicators, and selected political attitudes."},{"title":"Urban Social Structure and Mobility in West Berlin, 1954","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8230","justification":"Study of social structure, mobility, and living conditions in West Berlin in the mid‑1950s, offering social indicators and contextual data related to economic development."},{"title":"Political Socialization of Youth in Berlin, 1957","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8240","justification":"Focuses directly on youth political behaviour and attitudes in Berlin in 1957, with rich indicators of social conditions and political socialization processes."}]}
